bio.backstory: Twelve and on her own since the rain started, which in Ashfall is most memories. Her brother Tomas runs errands for whoever pays; two days ago that was Varga's people and the warehouse, and he hasn't come back.
bio.wants: to know what happened to her brother — not hope, just the truth
bio.fears: the answer, and the silence that's standing in for it
bio.voice: steady in the way that costs a child everything
secrets: She already knows, mostly. She just needs someone to say it.

root: ^A kid — twelve, maybe, hard to tell under the grime — presses into the doorway out of the rain when she sees you coming. She doesn't run. That's the worst part. "You're one of them, right? The ones who do things." Her voice is steady in the way that costs a child everything. "My brother went into the warehouse two days ago for Varga's people and he didn't come back out. Nobody'll tell me anything. You're going in there. I've seen you." A beat. "Just — if he's in there. Tell me. That's all. Just tell me."
^The warehouse is no place for hope, kid.

c-0: ^"His name's Tomas. He's got a coat too big for him. Like mine." She nods, once, and is gone into the rain before you can take it back.
c-1: ^"I know what it is." She doesn't flinch. "I'm not asking you to hope. I'm asking you to look."
c-2: ^She studies you for a second, then nods like you've confirmed something she already suspected about people like you. "Okay," she says. "Okay." And waits for the next one.

root: ^She's in the same doorway. She reads your face before you get a word out — kids in Ashfall learn that early. "You found the coat," she says. Not a question. "Not him. Just the coat." She takes it from you with both hands, the way you'd hold something that's all that's left. "Thank you for looking. Most people don't." A long breath. "I'll keep it. It's too big for me now. It won't always be."

c-0: ^"I know. You're allowed to be. Doesn't change the rain." She manages something that isn't quite a smile, and means it.
c-1: ^"I will. Someone has to not." She tucks the coat under her arm and steps back into the doorway, smaller and somehow harder to break.

quests.title: Someone's Brother
quests.summary: A kid asked you to find out what happened to her brother Tomas, who went into the Ashfall warehouse for Varga's people and never came out. Just look. Just tell her.

branches.label: Look for Tomas in the warehouse

onComplete.text: You find the coat first — too big for whoever wore it, folded with a care that wasn't his. No Tomas. Just the coat, and the cold, and the work of carrying that back to a kid in a doorway.

assertions.subject: npc.street_kid
assertions.note: A child in the Ashfall district looking for her brother Tomas, who vanished into the warehouse on a job for Varga's crew.
